title: TurboQuantConfig
description: Configuration schema for TurboQuant GPU-native quantization formats.

block_size.description: Number of weights per quantization block.

bits_per_weight.description: Average bits per weight after packing.

scale_bits.description: Bits per scale factor (8 = uint8, 16 = fp16).

zero_point.description: Whether a zero-point offset is stored per block.

group_size.description: Number of blocks sharing a single scale factor.

activation_aware.description: If true, quantization uses activation-aware rounding (sensitivity-weighted).

outlier_threshold.description: Absolute value above which a weight is treated as an outlier (0 = no outlier handling).

outlier_bits.description: Bits allocated to outlier weights (8 = uint8, 16 = fp16).

alignment.description: Block alignment in bytes. Must be >= 16 for Vulkan buffer reference compatibility.
